summary: Inspected the repository and left it on `feature/header` in a non-rebasing, non-merging state with only the ticket’s uncommitted changes present. The implementation adds a new page-level header above the calculator in `index.html`, updates `styles.css` for responsive header layout and typography, and keeps heading hierarchy valid by changing the calculator title from `h1` to `h2`. Runner metadata files `.codex-bin/git` and `.codex-last-message.json` are also modified for this ticket.
commitMessage: Add responsive page header above calculator
testingInstructions: From `/Users/robertandrews/.codex/runner-workspaces/ticket-8-8EWMgX/worktree`, run `npm ci`, `npm run build`, and `npm run test`. For a manual check, run `npm start` and open the local page to confirm the new header appears above the calculator on desktop and mobile widths.
